title: AI for In-house Counsel: Bringing real matters into focus with AMICUS AI
description: In-house legal teams are under more pressure than ever, and most of that pressure is invisible on a timesheet. It’s not just “one research query” or “one draft.” It’s the back-and-forth between business teams, regulatory changes landing without warning, notices that need a response yesterday, and the constant question from the top: “Are we covered?”Over the last three years, we’ve been building AMICUS AI at CaseMine with one simple idea in mind: if AI is going to matter for in-house counsel, it
